title: senecio pseudopicridis
intro: Senecio pseudopicridis, also known as false picridium groundsel, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. It is a shrub-like plant with medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and flowers, which contain pyrrolizidine alkaloids, compounds with hepatotoxic and carcinogenic effects. However, it has also been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Senecio pseudopicridis are typically made from its leaves and flowers, which can be consumed as teas, infusions, or tinctures, though caution is advised due to its potential toxicity.
